zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont於1100年出生在法國諾門迪艾斯陶迪維爾時，他的父親Robert de Stuteville III25歲，母親Jeanne Talbot85歲。他於大約1113年與Julienne de Thourotte在法國莫瑟勒瓦爾蒙特結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1177年享年77歲，埋葬在法國諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont于1100年出生在法国諾門迪艾斯陶迪維爾时，他的父亲Robert de Stuteville III25岁，母亲Jeanne Talbot85岁。他于大约1113年与Julienne de Thourotte在法国莫瑟勒瓦爾蒙特结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1177年享年77岁，埋葬在法国諾門迪瑟-馬利瓦爾蒙特。

nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Nicolas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Nicholas
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

en.lifeSummary: When Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont was born in 1100, in Estouteville, Normandy, France, his father, Robert de Stuteville III, was 25 and his mother, Jeanne Talbot, was 85. He married Julienne de Thourotte about 1113, in Valmont, Moselle, France. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1177, at the age of 77, and was buried in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandy, France.

historicEvents.description: Le nom de la localité est attesté sous les formes Walemunt (sans date) ou au XIIe siècle, Galemunt au XIIe siècle, Walemont en 1236, Walemont en 1262, Walemont en 1272, Vallemont en 1300, Valmont en 1385. Il s'agit d'une formation toponymique médiévale en -mont au sens de « colline, hauteur », appellatif précédé du nom de personne scandinave Váli (vieux danois Wale) que l'on rencontre dans plusieurs noms de lieux de Normandie

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicolas I d’Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont est né en 1100, à Estouteville, Normandie, France, son père, Robert de Stuteville III, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Jeanne Talbot, avait 85 ans. Il a épousé Julienne de Thourotte environ 1113, à Valmont, Moselle, France. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1177, à l’âge de 77 ans, et a été enterré à Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont 1100 in Estouteville, Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Stuteville III 25 und seine Mutter Jeanne Talbot 85. Er hat um 1113 in Walmen, Moselle, Frankreich Julienne de Thourotte geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1177 im Alter von 77 Jahren und wurde in Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont è nato il nel 1100 nel Estouteville, Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Robert de Stuteville III, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne Talbot, aveva 85 anni. Lui sposato Julienne de Thourotte circa 1113, nel Valmont, Moselle, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1177, all'età di 77 anni, e fu sepolto a Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmontが1100年にフランスノーマンディエストウテヴィルで生まれた時，父Robert de Stuteville IIIは25歳，母Jeanne Talbotは85歳であった。約1113年にフランスモセルヴァルモントでJulienne de Thourotteと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1177年に77歳で死去し，フランスノーマンディセアイネ-マリティメヴァルモントにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont(이)가 1100년 프랑스 노먼디 에스토우테빌에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Stuteville III(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne Talbot(은)는 85세였다. 그는 대략 1113년 프랑스 모셀 발몽에서 Julienne de Thourotte(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1177년 77세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노먼디 세이인-마이팀 발몽에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont nasceu em 1100, em Estouteville, Normandie, França, seu pai, Robert de Stuteville III, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne Talbot, tinha 85 anos. Ele casou-se com Julienne de Thourotte aproximadamente 1113, em Valmont, Moselle, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1177, com 77 anos, e foi sepultado em Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont родился в 1100 г. в местности эстоутевилл, норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Robert de Stuteville III было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne Talbot, 85. Он женился на женщине по имени Julienne de Thourotte около 1113 г. в местности валмонт, моселл, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1177 г. в возрасте 77 лет и был похоронен в местности валмонт, сине-маритим, норманди, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Nicolas I de Estouteville, Sgr de Valmont nació en 1100, en Estouteville, Normandie, Francia, su papá, Robert de Stuteville III, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Jeanne Talbot, tenía 85 años. Se casó con Julienne de Thourotte aproximadamente 1113, en Valmont, Moselle, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1177, a la edad de 77 años, y fue sepultado en Valmont, Seine-Maritime, Normandie, Francia.
